script_text: The main idea is what the text is mostly about.
Key details are facts that support the main idea.
Imagine a text about dogs as helpers.
Details: guide dogs. Therapy dogs. Search and rescue dogs.
Main idea: dogs help people in many ways.
A good summary is one sentence on the main idea plus two or three key details.
After reading, write one sentence: this text is about blank because blank.
Now you are ready to find main ideas!
